title: refactor of system/__init__.py, add unittests
body:
Refactored system to have call coverage based on the API docs
***some of these calls are not currently functional (because the API doesn't exist yet) and are noted in the code***

renamed the version call to ping as there is actually a real (planned) version endpoint

Also added some better test coverage for this.

comments.body: @mwhahaha Since you have taken the lead on this, I am willing to respect your judgement along with @jwhonce.

Thanks for the feedback.  Its been a while since I looked at this.  Took your feedback and integrated into the code as made since.  The latter couple of commits were just to fix the gating issues (since I forgot to lint locally).
@mwhahaha please give another look, requested changes have been made.
